summary: Phase 4 Testing: Habit Streaks Enhancement + Affiliate Center complete. 13/13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verification: Habits page shows streak badges (Current Streak, Best Streak, Total Days), Affiliate Center page with 4 category tabs working, Admin Settings has Affiliate and Habits tabs with full CRUD and Chatbase config.

issues: Clipboard writeText fails in automated testing due to browser security restrictions - works correctly with user interaction
DialogContent missing DialogTitle for screen readers - minor accessibility warning from Radix UI

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/habits/streak - auth required, returns {current_streak, longest_streak, total_days}
GET /api/habits/ - now includes streak field in response with full streak data
GET /api/affiliate-resources - auth required, returns resources grouped by category (conversation_starters, story_templates, marketing, faqs)
GET /api/affiliate-chatbase-public - auth required, returns {enabled, bot_id} where bot_id only included when enabled=true
POST /api/admin/affiliate-resources - admin auth, creates resource with title, content, category, order
GET /api/admin/affiliate-chatbase - admin auth, returns chatbase config
PUT /api/admin/affiliate-chatbase?bot_id=&enabled= - admin auth, saves chatbase config
_calc_habit_streak() calculates current_streak (consecutive days), longest_streak (best run), total_days (days with completions)
HabitTrackerPage.jsx shows streak badges with Flame, Trophy, Calendar icons for Current/Best/Total
AffiliateCenterPage.jsx has 4 category tabs + optional ConSim chatbot when enabled
AdminSettingsPage.jsx has AffiliateManagerCard for resource CRUD + Chatbase toggle/bot_id
Sidebar.jsx includes 'Affiliate Center' nav item with Share2 icon (data-testid='nav-affiliate')
seed_data_creation: Test resources created/deleted during backend tests (cleanup performed). Existing seed data: 1 Conversation Starters resource, 1 FAQ resource.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 fully implemented: (1) Habit Streaks Enhancement - GET /api/habits/streak and streak field in GET /api/habits/, UI shows Current/Best/Total streak badges on /habits page. (2) Affiliate Center - 4 categories (conversation_starters, story_templates, marketing, faqs), resources with copy-to-clipboard, optional Chatbase chatbot embed. (3) Admin Management - Full CRUD at /api/admin/affiliate-resources, Chatbase config at /api/admin/affiliate-chatbase, Admin Settings has 'Affiliate Center' tab. Test file: test_phase4_affiliate_streaks.py.

verified_features.details: Returns {current_streak, longest_streak, total_days} for authenticated user
Response now includes full streak object alongside habits[], completions_today[], etc.
Returns resources grouped by category (dict structure)
Returns {enabled: bool, bot_id: string} - bot_id only when enabled
Creates resource with title, content, category, order
Updates chatbase config via query params
data-testid='streak-badges' with Current Streak (Flame icon), Best Streak (Trophy), Total Days (Calendar)
data-testid='affiliate-center-page', 4 category tabs, resource cards with copy buttons
